scripts.dev:core: concurrently -n api,fe,watchdog,watchdog-fe -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "node scripts/watchdog-backend.cjs" "node scripts/watchdog-vite-interno.cjs"
scripts.dev:core:quiet: concurrently -n api,fe -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:full: npm install && npm run dev:full:backend && npm run dev:full:frontend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:full:backend: npm install --prefix backend && npm run generate --prefix backend
scripts.build:production: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build:frontend --prefix backend
